title: PRAXIS Universal Kit — Metrics Schema
description: Simplified sprint metrics schema for external PRAXIS participants. Each line in metrics.jsonl must validate against this schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the entry was logged

phase.description: Research phase: A=baseline (no governance), B=treatment (PRAXIS active)

task.description: Brief description of what was accomplished

duration.description: Time spent on the task, in minutes

model.description: AI model or tool used (free text — be consistent)

iterations.description: Number of AI generation cycles needed (1 = first attempt succeeded)

interventions.description: Number of times you had to correct or override the AI

autonomous.description: Did AI complete without human correction? (auto-derived: interventions==0)

layer.description: PRAXIS layer this task primarily relates to (Phase B only). L1=Governance, L2=Orchestration, L3=Execution, L4=Memory, L5=Production

praxis_q.description: PRAXIS-Q quality evaluation (Phase B only, <15 seconds)

governance_event.description: Governance event logged via 'praxis govern' (Phase B only)

description.description: What happened or what rule was added/modified

project.description: Optional project name for multi-project participants

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about this task

git_commit.description: Git commit hash at time of logging (auto-populated if in git repo)

session_id.description: Session identifier (auto-generated, groups entries from same work session)

schema_version.description: Schema version used to create this entry
